headline: HD 48 · DeCaprio
tagline: General-election defense — Colchester, Lebanon, Bozrah & Franklin

posture_copy.mission: Protect an incumbent Republican seat across four eastern Connecticut towns.
questions: Where is DeCaprio strongest, and where is the seat most exposed?
Which towns and precincts need turnout protection?
Where are unaffiliated voters concentrated enough to expand margin?
Where do Republicans underperform their registration share?
